---
# ============================================================
# PROJECTS PAGE (proj.qmd)
# Showcases your work with embedded PDF previews so visitors
# can read your reports directly on the page.
# ============================================================

title: "Projects"   # вњЏпёЏ Shown in the browser tab and page header
---

```{=html}
<!-- ============================================================
  OPTIONAL: Short intro sentence at the top of the page.
  вњЏпёЏ Replace or delete this.
  Example: "Here's a selection of projects from my coursework and personal work."
============================================================ -->
```

вњЏпёЏ A brief intro about your projects goes here.

------------------------------------------------------------------------

```{=html}
<!-- ============================================================
  PROJECT 1
  вњЏпёЏ Fill in every placeholder marked with вњЏпёЏ
  Copy this entire block (up to the next ---) to add more projects.
============================================================ -->
```

## вњЏпёЏ Project Title

**Course:** вњЏпёЏ COMP 101 вЂ” Introduction to Programming\
**Date:** вњЏпёЏ Fall 2024\
**Tags:** вњЏпёЏ `Python` `Data Analysis` `Visualization` <!-- Tags: just type whatever labels apply, wrapped in backticks like above -->

вњЏпёЏ Write 2вЂ“3 sentences describing what this project is about, what problem it solves, and what tools or methods you used. Keep it approachable вЂ” imagine explaining it to someone outside your major.

```{=html}
<!-- PDF PREVIEW
  - Replace "example_report.pdf" with your actual filename
  - Make sure the PDF is saved in the same folder as this .qmd file
  - width="100%" makes it stretch to fill the page column
  - height="600px" controls how tall the preview box is вЂ” increase for longer docs
  - The <p> fallback text shows only if the browser can't render the PDF inline
    (uncommon, but good to have)
-->
```

<iframe src="example_report.pdf" width="100%" height="600px" style="border: 1px solid #ddd; border-radius: 4px;">

<p>Your browser can't preview PDFs. <a href="вњЏпёЏ example_report.pdf">Click here to download instead.</a></p>

</iframe>

<!-- OPTIONAL: direct download link below the preview -->

[в¬‡ Download PDF](вњЏпёЏ%20example_report.pdf)

------------------------------------------------------------------------

```{=html}
<!-- ============================================================
  PROJECT 2
  вњЏпёЏ Same structure as above вЂ” fill in your details
============================================================ -->
```

## вњЏпёЏ Project Title

**Course:** вњЏпёЏ STOR 155 вЂ” Introduction to Statistics\
**Date:** вњЏпёЏ Spring 2025\
**Tags:** вњЏпёЏ `R` `Statistics` `ggplot2`

вњЏпёЏ Description of your second project goes here.

<iframe src="example_report2.pdf" width="100%" height="600px" style="border: 1px solid #ddd; border-radius: 4px;">

<p>Your browser can't preview PDFs. <a href="вњЏпёЏ example_report2.pdf">Click here to download instead.</a></p>

</iframe>

[в¬‡ Download PDF](вњЏпёЏ%20example_report2.pdf)

------------------------------------------------------------------------

```{=html}
<!-- ============================================================
  PROJECT 3
  вњЏпёЏ Same structure вЂ” delete this block entirely if you only have 2 projects
============================================================ -->
```

## вњЏпёЏ Project Title

**Course:** вњЏпёЏ BIOL 201 вЂ” Cell Biology\
**Date:** вњЏпёЏ Fall 2025\
**Tags:** вњЏпёЏ `Research` `Lab Report` `Data Collection`

вњЏпёЏ Description of your third project goes here.

<iframe src="example_report3.pdf" width="100%" height="600px" style="border: 1px solid #ddd; border-radius: 4px;">

<p>Your browser can't preview PDFs. <a href="вњЏпёЏ example_report3.pdf">Click here to download instead.</a></p>

</iframe>

[в¬‡ Download PDF](вњЏпёЏ%20example_report3.pdf)

```{=html}
<!-- ============================================================
  ADDING MORE PROJECTS LATER
  To add a new project, copy everything between two --- dividers
  and paste it at the bottom. Update all the вњЏпёЏ placeholders.
============================================================ -->
```
